NanoAI.description: Your commander: the only bot that can build others - protect it, because if it dies you can never build again.

NanoExplorer.description: Fast scout that ignores tissue density; its Scan 30 is your team's eyesight under fog of war.

NanoCollector.description: The worker: harvests AZN from nodes, delivers it to needles/containers/bank, and is the only bot that can shoot.

NanoContainer.description: A mobile 60-AZN tank for hauling big loads across long supply lines (it can harvest too, slowly).

NanoNeedle.description: Plant it on a Habitas Point to score every turn - the more AZN fed into it, the more points; it can never move.

NanoIPCreator.description: Opens a permanent new injection point (a banking depot) at its position, then expires after 500 turns.

NanoBlocker.description: A living roadblock: enemies crossing its cell pay +6 extra turns, and white cells are slowed too.

NanoWall.description: A temporary barrier that stops enemy movement and blocks all shots through its cell; crumbles after 50 turns.
